raw_consumer_statement: In XXXX, I've placed multiple orders with XXXX using XXXX different credit cards ; my Best Buy Visa Credit Card and XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX. These orders were shipped via XXXX and marked as delivered. However, the packages were stolen off my property shortly after delivery. I have video surveillance clearly showing the theft. I contacted XXXX but wouldn't assist. I then filed disputes with both Best Buy Visa and XXXX. I provided video ( Link ) of the theft and police report. Initially both card issuers reversed the charges but in XX/XX/year>, the charges were re-billed. Despite repeated efforts to provide evidence and request reconsideration by escalating it, both Best Buy Visa and XXXX have refused to issue a permanent refund. I never received the merchandise and provided all the reasonable proof. I believe this is a clear violation of the Fair Credit Billing Act because the items were never received in usable condition, and I acted with all required timelines.
